title: Brand voice reviewer
job: Lints copy against tone, banned phrases, and evidence requirements.
rule: Prefer precise edits over vague style advice.
samplePrompt: Review the current brand voice reviewer queue and write a prioritized action report.

liveIntegrations.openrouter: Model inference through @lab/openrouter when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is configured.
liveIntegrations.superserve: Sandbox execution through @lab/superserve-backend when SUPERSERVE_API_KEY is configured.
liveIntegrations.monid: Optional live tool discovery/run when MONID_API_KEY is valid.
